name: Thin Almond Saffron Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the almonds and set aside.
2. Place saffron threads in a spoon and heat. Crush to powder using a teaspoon.
3. Combine the powdered saffron with butter and sugar, then beat until creamy.
4. Gradually add the beaten egg while continuing to beat.
5. Add lemon juice and beat again.
6. Sift together flour, cornstarch, and baking powder.
7. Combine the dry ingredients with the butter mixture and ground almonds to form a ball.
8. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and chill for one hour.
9. Roll out half of the dough on a floured board until it is about 1/8 inch thick.
10. Sprinkle the rolled-out dough with granulated sugar and cut into 2-inch rounds.
11. Place the cookie rounds on a buttered baking sheet.
12. Bake at 350°F for 10-12 minutes, or until the edges are just beginning to turn golden.
13. Cool on racks. Repeat with the remaining dough.
